Alko Oy Keskusvarasto.reason: Major Finnish retailer with 168-day overdue invoice #4460; enforce strict net-45 terms and require prepayment or COD for future orders until #4460 resolves.

Kesko Oyj Päivittäistavarakauppa.reason: Large retail chain, only 13 days overdue on €3,296; tighten to net-30 and monitor weekly given scale of exposure.

My Dear Beer B.V..reason: Export customer, 59 days overdue; likely DSO ~35–40 for EU distribution but requires payment plan confirmation.

Wittich Weine und Biere AG.reason: German importer, 6 days overdue; typical German B2B DSO 40–45; hold new shipments pending resolution of #5999.

CBA Craft Beer Agency.reason: Distributor, 13 days overdue; enforce net-35 with automated dunning for future invoices.

alerts.message: Invoice #4460 (€18,484) is 534 days overdue. Escalate to legal/credit control immediately; suspend all new credit and require prepayment. This is material to cash flow.
Invoice #14 (€4,540) is 975 days overdue. Write-off or pursue debt recovery; do not ship further inventory until settled or formally disputed.

April cash risk: Fixed costs (€62,781/mo) + open POs (€79,996) + €74,663 overdue AR = €217,440 outflows vs. €201,863 budgeted revenue + €159,095 open AR (collection uncertain). Initiate daily cash position tracking and contact top 5 overdue customers by phone today.
Invoice #5151 (€9,558) is 59 days overdue. Contact immediately and establish written payment plan; withhold further shipments until partial payment received.
Invoice #3837 (€5,882) is 286 days overdue. Verify account status and dispute history; pursue settlement or write-off decision this week.

Own channels (Espoo Shop, Online Shop, Own Bars) represent low-risk fast cash (3–5 day DSO). Prioritize these channels for April–May to bridge the gap until high-season June export cash arrives (expect 6–8 week lag into July–August).
Invoice #6030 (€2,322) due yesterday (2026-04-15). Send payment reminder and confirm delivery; typical German DSO should be net-30.
Invoice #6202 (€2,394) due today (2026-04-16). Monitor for same-day or next-day payment; chase if not received by 2026-04-17 EOD.

insights.weekly_cash_risk: €74,663 in overdue AR (42 invoices, 4 >100 days old) collides with €79,996 in open POs and €62,781 fixed monthly costs; April revenue collection is uncertain and may not cover outflows without urgent receivables action.
insights.top_action: Call Alko Oy, My Dear Beer B.V., Wittich Weine und Biere AG, Kesko Oyj, and CBA Craft Beer Agency today by 5 PM to confirm payment dates and amounts; simultaneously flag Wet Goods PTE LTD (#14) and OlutSatama (#3837) for write-off assessment by finance lead. Document all calls.
pattern_insights: Export customers (EU/international: Alko, My Dear Beer B.V., Wittich, CBA, Gig Linden, Made in Poland) account for ~€39,392 overdue (53% of overdue AR); long DSO (6–8 weeks) is structural, but non-payment beyond 60 days signals credit or operational failure—tighten underwriting.

Extreme outliers (Wet Goods 975 days, Alko 534 days, OlutSatama 286 days) total €28,906 (39% of overdue) and appear uncollectable; immediate write-off or formal dispute escalation will clarify true working capital position and free management focus.
insights.wc_note: 62% YoY growth + 6–8 week export DSO creates severe working capital squeeze; €159K open AR vs. €79,996 POs and €62,781 fixed costs leaves minimal buffer. Bemböle contract end (Sept 2026) further reduces predictability. Prioritize own-channel cash acceleration and aggressive overdue resolution to survive April–May trough before peak summer revenue.
